commands: ssh -i %USERPROFILE%\.ssh\id_rsa -p 1998 wscc1031@wscc1031.synology.me "mkdir -p /volume1/DEMO/board-game-test && cd /volume1/DEMO/board-game-test && if [ -f docker-compose.yml ]; then /usr/local/bin/docker-compose -p board-game-test down; fi"
ssh -i %USERPROFILE%\.ssh\id_rsa -p 1998 wscc1031@wscc1031.synology.me "cd /volume1/DEMO/board-game-test && export PORT=3010 && /usr/local/bin/docker-compose -p board-game-test up -d"
